title: A Job Interview in Japan
learningGoal: The learner will listen to a formal business interview to comprehend spoken Keigo, potential forms, and reason-giving structures ('kara desu').
instructions: Listen to a candidate interviewing for a job at a Japanese company. Note why they came to Japan and what their abilities are.

contentItems.text: The interviewer will use formal language. The candidate will use polite forms and potential forms.

listeningGoal: Understand the candidate's motivations and language abilities.

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: なぜ にほんに いらっしゃいましたか。
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: Why did you come to Japan? (Respectful)

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: にほんの かいしゃで はたらきたい からです。
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Nihon no kaisha de hatarakitai kara desu.
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: Because I want to work at a Japanese company.

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: そうですか。にほんごは はなせますか。
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Sou desu ka. Nihongo wa hanasemasu ka.
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: I see. Can you speak Japanese? (Potential)

audioTranscriptSentences.targetText: はい。まいにち べんきょうしました から、はなせます。
audioTranscriptSentences.transliteration: Hai. Mainichi benkyou shimashita kara, hanasemasu.
audioTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: Yes. Because I studied every day, I can speak.

audioTranscriptFull:
（面接官）なぜ にほんに いらっしゃいましたか。
（候補者）にほんの かいしゃで はたらきたい からです。
（面接官）そうですか。にほんごは はなせますか。
（候補者）はい。まいにち べんきょうしました から、はなせます。

questionSet.questionText: What verb does the interviewer use to respectfully ask 'did you come'?
Why did the candidate come to Japan?
options: To work at a company (Kaisha de hataraku)

questionSet.questionText: What grammar structure does the candidate use to say 'Because I want to work'?
What verb does the interviewer use to ask 'Can you speak'?
Write the romaji for the word meaning 'Because' used at the end of the sentence to give a reason.

correctAnswers.q002: To work at a company (Kaisha de hataraku)

feedbackRules.onPass: Perfect listening! You successfully tracked multiple grammar structures in a real-world scenario.
feedbackRules.onFail: Listen again carefully. Review how 'kara' is used to mean 'because'.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort. Notice how the interviewer uses Sonkeigo (Irasshaimashita) because the candidate is technically a 'guest' at this stage.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: なぜ にほんに いらっしゃいましたか。にほんの かいしゃで はたらきたい からです。そうですか。にほんごは はなせますか。はい。まいにち べんきょうしました から、はなせます。

hintText: Listen for 'kara' (because) and the potential verb endings (emasu).
